name: The Waking of the Old Magic
description: A newly crowned monarch must weave court intrigue, folk superstition, and dangerous sorcery into a single reign as ancient wards fail, a dragon stirs, and the old magic wakes.

cards.prompt: The crown is barely warm upon your brow when the coronation candles gutter—not from wind, but from something stirring beneath the flagstones. The old magic is waking.

leftChoice.text: Slip away to the dusty royal archives.

rightChoice.text: Smile and reassure the frightened crowd.

cards.prompt: The mage guild sends a masked envoy: grant them independence from the crown, or they will withdraw their spells from your service entirely.

leftChoice.text: Grant them partial autonomy.

rightChoice.text: Refuse and remind them who wears the crown.

cards.prompt: Riders claim a great winged shadow was seen beyond the mountains. The court is split between panic and mockery.

leftChoice.text: Send scouts to learn the truth.

rightChoice.text: Dismiss it as drunken shepherds' fancy.

cards.prompt: The harvest depends on rites the crown only half-remembers. Priests await your command as the fields wither.

leftChoice.text: Perform the full, costly ancient rite.

rightChoice.text: Skip the rite and trust to plain labor.

cards.prompt: In a border village, terrified folk have bound a wise-woman to a pyre, blaming her for the strange lights in the sky.

leftChoice.text: Ride in and stop the burning.

rightChoice.text: Let the village keep its old justice.

cards.prompt: The wards that ring the kingdom flicker like dying coals. Left unmended, the barrier between worlds will thin.

leftChoice.text: Divert the treasury to repair them properly.

rightChoice.text: Patch them with forbidden shortcuts.

cards.prompt: A whisper reaches you: a jealous duke is quietly buying the loyalty of your guard.

leftChoice.text: Expose him before the full court.

rightChoice.text: Buy his silence and watch him closely.

cards.prompt: Famine follows the neglected fields. Hungry crowds gather at the palace gates.

leftChoice.text: Throw open the royal granaries.

rightChoice.text: Buy foreign grain at ruinous prices.

cards.prompt: The grateful wise-woman offers you a relic warm to the touch—a shard said to remember every spell ever spoken near it.

leftChoice.text: Accept the humming shard.

rightChoice.text: Leave it buried where it lies.

cards.prompt: The mage guild downs their staves and refuses all work until their demands are met. Spells sputter across the realm.

leftChoice.text: Sit at the table and negotiate.

rightChoice.text: Send soldiers to break the strike.

cards.prompt: The dragon crests the mountains at last, circling the capital in slow, patient arcs. It has not yet struck.

leftChoice.text: Ride out alone to parley with it.

rightChoice.text: Loose every ballista and blade you have.

cards.prompt: An audit of the treasury uncovers years of quiet theft by trusted officials.

leftChoice.text: Purge and prosecute the corrupt.

rightChoice.text: Cover it up to keep the court calm.

cards.prompt: A blind seer stumbles into the throne room and speaks a prophecy of a crown drowned in silver fire.

leftChoice.text: Take the warning to heart.

rightChoice.text: Have her escorted out; you make your own fate.

cards.prompt: Deep in a cave your searchers find a dragon's egg, veined with light and warm as a heartbeat.

leftChoice.text: Guard it as a treasure of the realm.

rightChoice.text: Destroy it before it can hatch.

cards.prompt: Raw arcane force gathers over the capital like a coming storm, ready to tear or to bless.

leftChoice.text: Channel the surge through the guild's mages.

rightChoice.text: Spend fortune and effort to seal it away.

cards.prompt: A cousin with a forged pedigree and real soldiers declares themselves the rightful heir.

leftChoice.text: Settle it by single combat.

rightChoice.text: Bind them to you by marriage and treaty.

cards.prompt: In a dream that is not a dream, the old magic itself offers a pact: dominion over the waking power, at a price it will not name.

leftChoice.text: Accept the pact and its hidden cost.

rightChoice.text: Refuse and trust in mortal hands.

cards.prompt: All threads converge: dragon, guild, harvest, and prophecy await your final decree in a hall thick with waiting magic.

leftChoice.text: Unite crown, guild, and folk as one.

rightChoice.text: Seize the arcane power for the throne alone.

cards.prompt: The failing wards give way at last, and the world beyond pours through. There is time for one true act.

leftChoice.text: Sacrifice your own gathered power to hold the line.

rightChoice.text: Rally the people to stand where magic cannot.

cards.prompt: Dawn breaks over a kingdom forever changed. The old magic no longer sleeps—but it answers, now, to a crown that learned to listen. Your reign is remembered.

leftChoice.text: Rule with wisdom and open eyes.

rightChoice.text: Rule with a strong and steady hand.
